description_long: This is a blue four-door sedan with a streamlined body and a sunroof, typical of mid-2000s European automotive design. The front features a wide grille with chrome accents and clear headlamps, while the rear displays large, horizontally oriented tail lights and a subtle trunk lip. The side profile reveals flush door handles, black trim around the windows, and alloy wheels with a five-spoke design. The windows are tinted, and the car has a visible sunroof panel on the roof. Both front and rear license plates are present, with the text 'SHW 238' visible. The overall appearance suggests a practical, comfortable vehicle suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A blue four-door sedan with a sunroof, chrome-accented grille, alloy wheels, and visible license plates. The design is sleek and practical, with tinted windows and a modern profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide grille, clear headlamps, and front license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, sunroof, alloy wheels, and streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large tail lights, rear license plate, and trunk details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sunroof, four doors, and alloy wheels.
attribute_license_plate: Front and rear plates, white background, black text, reads 'SHW 238'
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke alloy wheels, dark metallic color, simple and modern design
